headline: Tutor Perini (TPC) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback And Backlog Growth
summary: Why Tutor Perini Stock Is Drawing Fresh Attention Tutor Perini (TPC) is back on many watchlists after a sharp move in its share price over the past month, prompting closer scrutiny of its valuation, business mix, and recent financial results. See our latest analysis for Tutor Perini. While the share price has eased about 21% over the past month, it still carries a 7.12% year to date share price gain and a very large 3 year total shareholder return that suggests earlier buyers have already...
